## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO strategy, blog performance, and technical challenges with site migration.](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Critical indexing issues due to WordPress-to-Webflow migration are impacting blog performance and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team to prioritize completing site migration to Webflow, including developing a strategy for remaining pages](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Need for more granular reporting on blog performance, especially for recently published content](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Plans to optimize blog CTAs and implement A/B testing for free trial vs. demo CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Site Migration and Indexing Issues

  - [WordPress-to-Webflow migration (Oct 2024) causing significant indexing problems](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Majority of high-performing blogs likely published pre-migration](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [No blogs from 2025 attracting leads, flagging potential issues](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Cameron to initiate conversations with infrastructure team about reversing site architecture](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Proposal: Make Webflow the default site, with specific rules for remaining WordPress pages](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Team to review all non-migrated blogs and develop a strategy for quick migration](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

### Blog Performance Reporting

  - [Current aggregate reporting doesn't provide full picture of content performance](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Ritesh requests more granular data:](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [Performance of recently published blogs (e.g., last week/month)](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Top 100 performing blogs with publication dates](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Monthly breakdown of blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Team to implement new reporting structure for Thursday calls](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Cameron implemented changes to inline CTAs, now promoting free trials (more valuable than playbooks)](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [New feature: Ability to change sidebar CTA button between "Free Trial" and "Book a Demo"](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Strategy: Use "Free Trial" CTA for small business-focused content, "Book a Demo" for enterprise-targeted blogs](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Team to provide more recommendations on blog optimization (e.g., images, CTAs)](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

### Translation Project Update

  - [Cameron plans to translate \~5 blogs by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Will unpublish English blogs on French site for better user experience](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Translated blogs will have new URLs (e.g., /fr/blog/translated-slug)](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Cameron to update shared spreadsheet with new translated blog URLs](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cameron to initiate conversations with infrastructure team about site architecture changes](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Review and develop strategy for migrating remaining WordPress pages to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Implement more granular blog performance reporting for Thursday calls](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide recommendations on blog page optimization](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Continue blog translation project and monitor performance](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Investigate and address indexing issues post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Implement and test new CTA strategies on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/67qarEFA9ucio5wJJ7QFQmrHQ4H4JxXn?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
